description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines three stages: build, test, and deploy, using the default alpine:latest image but overriding the image for each serverless job to registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlabktl:latest. Add a .serverless:build:functions job in the build stage that runs '/usr/bin/gitlabktl serverless build'. Add a .serverless:build:image job in the build stage that runs '/usr/bin/gitlabktl app build'. Add a .serverless:deploy:functions job in the deploy stage, set its environment to development, and run '/usr/bin/gitlabktl serverless deploy'. Add a .serverless:deploy:image job in the deploy stage, also with environment development, that runs '/usr/bin/gitlabktl app deploy'. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
